task_completion.description: Open the original T8 housing bracket file in FreeCAD.
task_completion.visual_evidence: FreeCAD application is open with 'T8_housing_bracket' visible in the window title, active tab, or Model tree view.

task_completion.description: Change the central bore diameter to 16.0 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sketcher or property dialog is visible showing the central hole dimension changed to a diameter of 16.0 mm (or a radius of 8.0 mm).

task_completion.description: Change the four base mounting hole diameters to 5.5 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sketcher or property dialog is visible showing the base mounting hole dimensions changed to a diameter of 5.5 mm (or a radius of 2.75 mm).

task_completion.description: Do not modify the overall outer dimensions of the bracket.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The overall shape and outer boundaries of the bracket in the 3D view remain unchanged; only the internal hole sizes are modified.
A 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'modified_housing.FCStd' in the '~/Documents/FreeCAD/' directory, or the FreeCAD window title/tab updated to 'modified_housing'.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD GUI to make the modifications.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with FreeCAD's graphical interface, such as the Sketcher workbench, property editor, or 3D view, rather than text editors or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the 3D geometry parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the specific dimensions (16.0mm/8.0mm radius and 5.5mm/2.75mm radius) being entered into FreeCAD's constraint or property fields.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows do not show Python scripts or FreeCAD console commands being executed to automatically generate the output file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input file: /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/T8_housing_bracket.FCStd. Output file: /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/modified_housing.FCStd. Target central bore diameter is exactly 16.0mm (radius 8.0mm). Target mounting hole diameter is exactly 5.5mm (radius 2.75mm). Tolerance for both is 0.1mm.
